---
title: Learning Python with LLMs
description: An introductory course to programming in &nbsp;[![](img/logo_python.svg){width="1.3em"}](https://www.python.org/) using large language models
title-block-banner: true
---

:::{.topdef}

This introductory course on [Python](https://www.python.org/) does not assume any prior programming experience.

:::

<br>
[[Start course ➤](llm_why.qmd)]{.topinline}

<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "LearningResource",
  "name": "Learning Python with LLMs",
  "description": "An introductory course to programming in Python using large language models.",
  "url": "https://mint.westdri.ca/python/top_llm",
  "learningResourceType": "course",
  "inLanguage": "en",
  "license": "https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/",
  "provider": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "SFU Research Computing Group",
  },
  "keywords": "Python, llm, webscraping",
  "author": {
    "@type": "Person",
    "name": "Marie-Hélène Burle"
  }
}
</script>
